summary: Iteration 3 improvements (boss feedback: 想辦法更好): (1) Added 'Open Now' filter toggle — shows only currently open venues based on operating hours; (2) Re-enabled child age filter (was commented out 'for mobile stability') — parents can select child age 0-12 years, venues outside the age range are filtered; (3) Added debounced search (300ms) using new useDebounce hook — prevents API thrash on rapid typing; (4) Added 'Recently Viewed' pill-row in sidebar showing up to 5 last-viewed venues with persistent localStorage; (5) Connected handleSelectLocation across all location-click paths to consistently record recently viewed; (6) Added 13 new tests: 7 for useDebounce hook (timer reset, rapid updates, undefined values) and 6 for LocationList age/openNow filters. Total: 2549 client tests, 232 server tests — all pass.
next_action: All quality gates passed. System now has smarter UX: Open Now filter, child age compatibility, debounced search, and recently viewed navigation.
